SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AbstractElement<T>
Represents an abstract keyed element.
AbstractScheduler
Represents the tick based task scheduler.
Button
Represents a button element.
Checkbox
Represents a checkbox element.
Circle
Represents a circle element.
ComponentAdapter
A custom JSON (de)serializer for the GSON library specifically for adventure components.
Connection
Represents a network connection.
Element
Represents an element.
Element.Type
Represents an element type.
ElementAdapter
A custom JSON (de)serializer for the GSON library specifically for elements.
Gradient
Represents a gradient filled rectangle element.
Guithium
The Guithium API.
Guithium.Provider
The Guithium instance provider.
HelloPacket
Represents a packet that players send when they join the server.
Image
Represents an image element.
JsonSerializable
Represents an object that can be (de)serialized to/from JSON.
JsonSerializable.Adapter<T>
A custom JSON (de)serializer for the GSON library specifically for JsonSerializable objects.
Key
Simple string wrapper used to identify objects.
Keyed
Represents an object with a unique identifier.
LabeledRect<T>
Represents a labeled rectangle element with an optional tooltip.
Line
Represents a line element.
NetworkHandler
Represents a network handler.
Packet
Represents a packet of data to send to/from server/client.
PacketListener
Represents a listener of packets.
PlayerManager
Represents a manager of wrapped players.
Radio
Represents a radio box element.
Rect<T>
Represents a rectangle element
Screen
Represents a screen of gui elements.
Slider
Represents a slider element.
Task
Represents a task that can be scheduled
Text
Represents a text element.
Textbox
Represents a textbox element.
Texture
Represents an image texture.
TextureManager
A texture manager that manages textures to store textures that need to be managed.
Unsafe
Unsafe utils
Vec2
Represents a size (x and y)
Vec4
Represents a 4D vector.
WrappedPlayer
A wrapper for a player connected to the server.
